caption: A woman with dark curly hair tied up in a bun is seated in a studio, wearing a dark green t-shirt with a red and white graphic. She wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone mounted on a stand. Behind her is a white wall featuring a black backdrop with white text that reads "BESS TALK 101" and "In A League Hustle," along with the word "CAST." A framed photo showing a person's hands and arms is mounted on the wall to her right. To her left is a small table holding a clear container of blue items. On-screen graphics include a "BESS TALK 101" logo in the bottom right and a logo featuring "BESS TALK 101" in the bottom left. Across the sequence, the woman remains in place, smiling and gesturing slightly with her head as she speaks.
